cleavage agent: the proteins were digested with Trypsin/LysC into peptides according to the Sp3 method
fragmentation method: the mass spectrometer model (Q-Exactive) operating in DDA mode
instrument: analyzed through LC–MS/MS using a preconcentration setup on an Ultimate3000 RSLC LC in line with a Q-Exactive Orbitrap HF-X spectrometer
labeling: Label-free quantification (LFQ) was performed to calculate protein abundances
